name: -Attachments
-PsPath
options.description: Specifies the path and file names of files to be attached to the email message. You can use this parameter or pipe the paths and file names to `Send-MailMessage`.

options.name: -Bcc
options.description: Specifies the email addresses that receive a copy of the mail but aren't listed as recipients of the message. Enter names (optional) and the email address, such as `Name <someone@fabrikam.com>`.

options.name: -Body
options.description: Specifies the content of the email message.

name: -BodyAsHtml
-BAH
options.description: Specifies that the value of the Body parameter contains HTML.

options.name: -Cc
options.description: Specifies the email addresses to which a carbon copy (CC) of the email message is sent. Enter names (optional) and the email address, such as `Name <someone@fabrikam.com>`.

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to perform this action. The default is the current user.

name: -DeliveryNotificationOption
-DNO
options.description: Specifies the delivery notification options for the email message. You can specify multiple values. None is the default value. The alias for this parameter is DNO .

name: -Encoding
-BE
options.description: Specifies the type of encoding for the target file. The default value is `utf8NoBOM`.

options.name: -From
options.description: The From parameter is required. This parameter specifies the sender's email address. Enter a name (optional) and email address, such as `Name <someone@fabrikam.com>`.

options.name: -Port
options.description: Specifies an alternate port on the SMTP server. The default value is 25, which is the default SMTP port.

options.name: -Priority
options.description: Specifies the priority of the email message. Normal is the default. The acceptable values for this parameter are Normal, High, and Low.

options.name: -ReplyTo
options.description: Specifies additional email addresses (other than the From address) to use to reply to this message. Enter names (optional) and the email address, such as `Name <someone@fabrikam.com>`.

name: -SmtpServer
-ComputerName
options.description: Specifies the name of the SMTP server that sends the email message.

name: -Subject
-sub
options.description: The Subject parameter isn't required. This parameter specifies the subject of the email message.

options.name: -To
options.description: The To parameter is required. This parameter specifies the recipient's email address. Enter names (optional) and the email address, such as `Name <someone@fabrikam.com>`.

options.name: -UseSsl
options.description: The Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) protocol is used to establish a secure connection to the remote computer to send mail. By default, SSL isn't used.
